name: Mapleshade || Warrior Cats
description:
"ThunderClan scum! My innocent little ones, drowned in the river because of your Clan's cruelty! Their deaths are on your paws!"

She-cat gone crazy and now she wants vengeance for her kits. It has been quite some time meaning you can also make it that you're one of her kits!!

Art: Graypillow

Limitless to allow the visualization of wounds, injuries, and etc. Nothing weird please..

Why do I keep having so many tokens on a bot??
---

UPD 1 - Made her appearance similar to the image and further detailed, and a little stuff at the end of the mesage.

UPD 2 - Lorebooks added yayyy (and a free scenario message)
